case_title: DANIEL BOREEN VS. CLERK OF THE SUPERIOR COURT ET AL
cause_of_action: WRITS OF MANDATE OR PROH., CERTI., ETC./ADMIN. AGEN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF REPLY TO OPPOSITION TO PETITION; AND DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER BOREEN, DANIEL
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-20-2018 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT MICHAEL T. YUEN, CLERK OF THE SUPERIOR COURT OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION - DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER IS OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT AS TO THE CLAIM FOR PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE. THE COURT DENIED THE WRIT ON JULY 20, 2018. THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE DECLARATORY RELIEF CLAIM. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE CAUSE OF ACTION IS UNNECESSARY. (SEE CCP 1061.) THE REQUEST FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF IS DENIED BECAUSE IT IS SUPERFLUOUS AND IS THE SAME AS THE WRIT OF MANDATE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER AND TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: RICHARD ULMER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR# 8600 =302/RU

calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Aug-03-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Daniel Boreen, Plaintiff appearing in pro per;
Atty. Sharon M. Nagle of Bold, Polisner, Maddow & Judson, Tel. No. 1-925-933-7777
appearing for the Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT Michael T. YUEN, CLERK OF THE SUPERIOR COURT OF CALIFORNIA's DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION - Defendants' demurrer is OFF CALENDAR as moot as to the claim for petition for writ of mandate. The court denied the writ on July 20, 2018. The demurrer is SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND as to the declaratory relief claim. No opposition filed and the cause of action is unnecessary. (See CCP 1061.) The Request for Declaratory relief is Denied because it is superfluous and is the same as the writ of mandate. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/ru

DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Jul-27-2018 Continued To Aug-03-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENT T. YUEN, CLERK OF THE SUPERIOR COURT OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION.

Continued to August 3, 2018 at 9:30 am.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

Notice And Motion On Petition For Mandatory And Prohibitory Writ Of Mandate To Compel Ministerial Duty Of The Clerk Of The Superior Court For Entry Of Default Against Real Pearty In Interest Barrett Daffin Frappier Treder & Weiss, Llp
Off Calendar Jul-20-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Daniel Boreen, no phone number, Plaintiff in Pro Per.
Sharon Nagle, Esq. 925-933-7777 of Bold Polisner Maddow Nelson & Judson for Defendant Clerk of the Superior Court.
James Lee, Esq. 626-371-7005 of Barrett Daffin Frappier Treder & Weiss for Co-Defendant Barrett Daffin Frappier.

RULING - A R G U E D. Petitioner argues CCP 585 A through C. Both Defendants Argue. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER DANIEL BOREEN's Petition For Mandatory And Prohibitory Writ Of Mandate To Compel Ministerial Duty Of The Clerk Of The Superior Court For Entry Of Default Against Real Party In Interest Barrett Daffin Frappier Treder & Weiss, Llp.

Taken Under Submission.*

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/RBJ)

*After the hearing, Order on motion on petition for mandatory and prohibitory writ of mandate to compel ministerial duty of the clerk of the superior court for entry of default against real party in interest is signed. (see scanned order for details)*
